scope.target: Code-reviewer transient and durable assessment output contracts
constraints: Review only; do not implement refactors
Use skill-owned report template and repository-owned assessment locator

steps: Define finding IDs and downstream handoff
validation: Validate canonical skill and assessment references
execution.last_completed_step: Added transient and durable code-review modes, a pinned-revision assessment report contract, stable CR finding references, and downstream remediation routing.
execution.next_action: Run full closeout validation under ASMG-005.

results.summary: Code-reviewer now persists explicitly requested large reviews as standalone assessments without assuming remediation authority.
tests_run: Codex and Claude code-reviewer wrapper quick validation
results.residual_risk: The report template cannot guarantee semantic review quality; code-reviewer reasoning and evidence remain required.
